description: The nike Fivekay women's shoe is an iconic design and an all-time athletic favorite. Taken from the tennis courts and loved for its impressive versatility, the nike Fivekay features premium metallic finishes for flavor and a Fit perfect for dependable comfort.UpperGlittery golden canvas and leather upper and reinforced toe tip for durabilityHas a white swoosh brandingLace-up for snug fitNike brand tag appliqued on the tonguePull tag to slide your foot in easilyMidsoleAutoclave midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleSolid rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for traction and durability.Shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
